asset_editor.bootstrap.confirm.title: Install Voxel Studio runtime
asset_editor.bootstrap.confirm.descripti: Voxel Studio relies on the Compose UI framework. Its runtime libraries are not bundled with the mod and will be downloaded on first use.
asset_editor.bootstrap.confirm.body:
%1$s

Approximate download size: %2$s. Files are cached under ~/.asset_editor and reused by every instance.
asset_editor.bootstrap.hud.title: Installing Voxel Studio runtime
asset_editor.bootstrap.chat.network_fail: Voxel Studio runtime download failed. Check your internet connection and try again.
asset_editor.bootstrap.chat.report: If this keeps happening and it is not a simple connection issue, send your latest log on Discord.

debug:payload.asset_editor.permission_sy: Synchronizes the current user's permissions from the server to the client.
debug:payload.asset_editor.pack_list_req: Requests the current list of available packs from the server.
debug:payload.asset_editor.pack_list_syn: Sends the current list of available packs from the server to the client.
debug:payload.asset_editor.pack_create.d: Requests creation of a new pack with the provided name and namespace.
debug:payload.asset_editor.pack_workspac: Requests the full workspace snapshot for one pack and one registry.
Sends the full workspace snapshot for one pack and one registry to the client.
debug:payload.asset_editor.workspace_mut: Requests a mutation on a specific element inside a selected pack workspace.
debug:payload.asset_editor.workspace_syn: Sends a mutation result or a remote workspace update to connected clients.
debug:payload.asset_editor.recipe_catalo: Sends the full recipe catalog with visual data to the client.
debug:payload.asset_editor.element_seed_: Requests a single element snapshot to seed the client workspace.
debug:payload.asset_editor.server_data_r: Requests server-side data such as recipe catalogs or compendium entries.
debug:payload.asset_editor.server_data_s: Sends server-side data to the client for a specific data key.

enchantment:simulation.title: Enchantment Table Simulation
enchantment:simulation.description: Simulate enchanting mechanics and probability outcomes
enchantment:simulation.enchant_sublabel: Select a slot to run simulation
enchantment:simulation.enchantability.de: Automatically set based on the item, used in the simulation.
enchantment:simulation.current_pack.desc: Only simulates enchantments edited in your current datapack
enchantment:simulation.tooltip.title: Show Tooltip
enchantment:simulation.tooltip.descripti: When enabled, the tooltip will be shown on the item permanently.
enchantment:simulation.results.title: Probability Results
enchantment:simulation.results.descripti: Calculated based on the number of iterations, one iteration is one attempt to enchant the item
The total probability does not add up to 100%, as multiple enchantments can be applied to a single item
enchantment:simulation.results.empty.des: Click on one of the three slots to see probability results
enchantment:simulation.dialog.usage.titl: How to Use the Enchantment Simulation
enchantment:simulation.dialog.usage.body: This tool simulates the enchanting table mechanics to help you balance your datapack enchantments.
enchantment:simulation.dialog.usage.list: Set the three parameters: bookshelf count, enchantability, and iterations.
Click on one of the three enchantment options to run the simulation.
Higher iterations take longer but provide more accurate results.
enchantment:simulation.dialog.stats.body: The results table shows probability statistics based on your simulation parameters.
enchantment:simulation.dialog.stats.list: Each enchantment's appearance probability is calculated.
Average levels and level ranges are displayed.
Results consider weight, max_level, costs, enchantability, bookshelf count, tiers, and enchantment incompatibilities (Exclusive Set / Non Combinable).
enchantment:simulation.dialog.results.bo: This shows the results of a single enchantment attempt, unlike the grouped large-scale statistics.
enchantment:simulation.dialog.results.li: Click the book icon to permanently display single iteration results on items.
Otherwise, hover over items to see their enchantments from the single iteration.
enchantment:simulation.dialog.item_selec: You can change the item being enchanted to test different scenarios.
Click on the item slot to open the Dynamic Toolbar item selector.
Select and validate your choice. The enchantability value updates automatically.
Available items are calculated from enchantments, so only enchantable items are displayed.
enchantment:overview.title: Enchantments
enchantment:overview.enchanting_table: This enchantment can be found on an enchanting table
enchantment:overview.chest: This enchantment can be found in chests
enchantment:overview.tradeable: This enchantment can be traded by villagers like a book
enchantment:overview.tradeable_equipment: This enchantment can be traded by villagers like an item
enchantment:overview.price_doubled: The price of the trade is doubled

enchantment:section.slots.description: When the enchantment effect should be activated.
enchantment:section.supported.descriptio: Which items are compatible with this enchantment.
enchantment:toggle.supported.title: Supported
enchantment:toggle.primary.title: Enchanting Table
enchantment:toggle.group.title: Predefined Group
enchantment:toggle.individual.title: Arbitrary Choice
slot:head: Head
enchantment:slots.explanation.title: Here's how enchantment slots work and when their effects kick in:
enchantment:slots.explanation.list.1: Take Fire Aspect for example - if you put it on your main hand or offhand weapon, it'll set enemies on fire when you hit them.
enchantment:slots.explanation.list.2: And if you put Fire Aspect on any armor piece (head, chest, legs or feet) and you equip it, it'll light up enemies every time you attack.
enchantment_tag:minecraft:in_enchanting_: This enchantment can be obtained from the enchanting table.
enchantment_tag:minecraft:on_mob_spawn_e: This enchantment can be found on mob equipment.
enchantment_tag:minecraft:on_random_loot: This enchantment can be found on naturally generated equipment in chests or other rewards.
enchantment_tag:minecraft:tradeable.desc: This enchantment can be sold by villagers as an enchanted book.
enchantment_tag:minecraft:on_traded_equi: This enchantment can be sold by villagers on equipment.
enchantment_tag:minecraft:curse.desc: This enchantment will have a red description and cannot be removed with a grindstone
enchantment_tag:minecraft:non_treasure.d: Used in loot tables like fishing junk, certain structures, etc.
enchantment_tag:minecraft:treasure.desc: Used in loot tables like fishing rewards.
enchantment_tag:minecraft:smelts_loot.de: Items dropped by mobs will be smelted.
enchantment_tag:minecraft:prevents_ice_m: Ice will not turn into water when broken
enchantment_tag:minecraft:prevents_infes: Infested blocks will not spawn silverfish.
enchantment_tag:minecraft:prevents_bee_s: Prevent bees from spawning when breaking hive
The hive will not spawn bees when broken, and bees will be included in the block data.
enchantment_tag:minecraft:prevents_decor: Decorated pots will not break when broken with a tool or projectile.
enchantment_tag:minecraft:double_trade_p: This enchantment is charged twice as much in villager trades.
enchantment:technical.effects.title: Enchantment effects
enchantment:global.minCostBase.title: Minimum base cost
enchantment:global.minCostPerLevelAboveF: Minimum cost per level above the first
enchantment:global.maxCostBase.title: Maximum base cost
enchantment:global.maxCostPerLevelAboveF: Maximum cost per level above the first
enchantment.exclusive:custom.fallback: Does not contain any custom enchantment lists.
enchantment_tag:minecraft:exclusive_set/: Contains all exclusive enchantments for armor.
Contains all exclusive enchantments for bows.
Contains all exclusive enchantments for crossbows.
Contains all exclusive enchantments for damage.
Contains all exclusive enchantments for Riptide.
Contains all exclusive enchantments for mining.
Contains all exclusive enchantments for boots.
enchantment:exclusive.actions.target.des: Makes the enchantment target the tags list, making it incompatible with all enchantments in that list.
enchantment:exclusive.actions.membership: Adds this enchantment to the tags list
effect:minecraft:ammo_use.desc: Amount of ammunition used when firing a bow or crossbow.
effect:minecraft:armor_effectiveness.des: Effectiveness of the target's armor during an attack. 0 means completely ineffective; 1 means fully effective.
effect:minecraft:attributes.desc: Modifies player statistics when the weapon is equipped or held.
effect:minecraft:block_experience.desc: Performs a mathematical operation on the experience gained from breaking a block.
effect:minecraft:crossbow_charge_time.de: Time required to fully charge the crossbow.
effect:minecraft:crossbow_charging_sound: Plays a sound when the crossbow is fully charged.
effect:minecraft:damage.desc: Amount of damage dealt by an attack.
effect:minecraft:damage_immunity.desc: Grants immunity to damage under certain conditions.
effect:minecraft:damage_protection.desc: Reduces the amount of damage received from attacks.
effect:minecraft:equipment_drops.desc: Chance of equipment dropping from a killed entity. Value ranges from 0 to 1.
effect:minecraft:fishing_luck_bonus.desc: Increases the player's luck when fishing.
Reduces the time it takes to catch a fish.
effect:minecraft:hit_block.desc: Triggers an action when the player or a projectile hits a block.
effect:minecraft:item_damage.desc: Amount of durability lost when an item is damaged.
effect:minecraft:knockback.desc: Amount of knockback caused by an attack.
effect:minecraft:location_changed.desc: Triggers an action when the player changes location.
effect:minecraft:mob_experience.desc: Performs a mathematical operation on the experience gained from killing a mob.
effect:minecraft:post_attack.desc: Triggers an action after an attack.
effect:minecraft:prevent_armor_change.de: Prevents the player from unequipping armor.
Prevents the item from dropping when the player dies.
effect:minecraft:projectile_count.desc: Increases the number of projectiles fired.
effect:minecraft:projectile_piercing.des: Changes the number of entities a projectile can pierce.
effect:minecraft:projectile_spawned.desc: Triggers an action when a projectile is spawned.
effect:minecraft:projectile_spread.desc: Alters the spread distance between projectiles.
effect:minecraft:repair_with_xp.desc: Performs a mathematical operation on the weapon's durability when experience is gained.
effect:minecraft:smash_damage_per_fallen: Performs a mathematical operation on damage based on the number of blocks fallen.
effect:minecraft:tick.desc: Triggers an action on every game tick.
effect:minecraft:trident_return_accelera: Changes the speed at which a trident returns to the player.
effect:minecraft:trident_sound.desc: Plays a sound when the trident is thrown.
effect:minecraft:trident_spin_attack_str: Modifies the strength of the trident's spin attack.

settings:title: Settings
settings:description: Preferences are stored in config/asset_editor.json and persist across sessions.
settings:performance.title: Performance
settings:performance.fps_counter.title: Show FPS counter
settings:performance.fps_counter.descrip: Overlay the current frame rate and worst frame time in the top-right corner.
settings:performance.disable_vsync.title: Disable VSync
settings:performance.disable_vsync.descr: Let the renderer present frames as fast as possible. Without VSync the Windows compositor no longer paces the app to 60 Hz, at the cost of possible tearing.
settings:performance.disable_vsync.resta: Takes effect after the studio window is reopened.
settings:debug.title: Debug
settings:debug.stay_on_splash.title: Stay on splash screen
settings:debug.stay_on_splash.descriptio: When enabled, the splash screen waits for a click or key press before advancing to the editor.
settings:debug.show_hover_triangle.title: Show hover triangle overlay
settings:debug.show_hover_triangle.descr: Render the Radix-style safe triangle used by dropdown menus for debugging hover tracking.
settings:debug.clear_compose_cache.title: Clear Compose cache
settings:debug.clear_compose_cache.descr: Delete the cached runtime and close the studio window. Next launch will re-download the Compose runtime.
recipe:toast.min_ingredient: A recipe requires at least one ingredient.
recipe:components.title: Result components
recipe:components.description: Data components applied to the crafted item.
recipe:components.add.title: Add a component
recipe:components.unit_flag: Flag present when component is set.
component:minecraft:attack_range.desc: Configures melee reach and hitbox margins.
Modifies entity attributes while the item is held or worn.
component:minecraft:axolotl/variant.desc: Visual variant of the axolotl stored in the bucket.
component:minecraft:banner_patterns.desc: List of colored pattern layers displayed on the banner.
component:minecraft:base_color.desc: Background dye color of a shield or banner.
component:minecraft:bees.desc: Bees stored inside the hive item.
component:minecraft:block_entity_data.de: Raw NBT applied to the block entity when placed.
component:minecraft:block_state.desc: Block state properties applied when placed.
component:minecraft:break_sound.desc: Sound played when the item breaks.
component:minecraft:bucket_entity_data.d: Raw NBT for the entity stored in a bucket.
component:minecraft:can_break.desc: Blocks this item is allowed to break in Adventure mode.
component:minecraft:can_place_on.desc: Blocks this item is allowed to be placed on in Adventure mode.
component:minecraft:cat/collar.desc: Dye color of the cat's collar.
component:minecraft:container.desc: Items stored inside a container block item.
component:minecraft:container_loot.desc: Loot table used to fill the container on first open.
component:minecraft:creative_slot_lock.d: Prevents the item from being swapped out of a hotbar slot.
component:minecraft:custom_data.desc: Free-form NBT payload for non-vanilla consumers.
component:minecraft:custom_model_data.de: Resourcepack hooks: float, flag, string and color channels.
component:minecraft:custom_name.desc: User-given display name, overrides the item's default name.
component:minecraft:damage.desc: Current durability damage of the item.
component:minecraft:damage_resistant.des: Damage type tag this item is immune to when used.
component:minecraft:damage_type.desc: Damage type used by this projectile or weapon.
component:minecraft:death_protection.des: Effects applied when the item saves the holder from death (totem-like).
component:minecraft:debug_stick_state.de: Block property currently selected by the debug stick.
component:minecraft:dyed_color.desc: RGB color applied by dyeing (leather armor, etc.).
component:minecraft:enchantable.desc: Enchantment value used by the enchanting table.
component:minecraft:enchantment_glint_ov: Force the enchantment glint on or off.
component:minecraft:enchantments.desc: Enchantment levels applied to this item.
component:minecraft:entity_data.desc: Raw NBT applied to the entity when spawned from this item.
component:minecraft:equippable.desc: Makes the item wearable in an equipment slot.
component:minecraft:firework_explosion.d: Single firework star explosion shape and colors.
component:minecraft:fireworks.desc: Firework flight duration and explosion layers.
component:minecraft:food.desc: Nutrition and saturation granted when eaten.
component:minecraft:glider.desc: Marks the item as a glider (elytra-like).
component:minecraft:instrument.desc: Goat horn instrument played by this item.
component:minecraft:intangible_projectil: Marks this projectile as non-collidable with the owner.
component:minecraft:item_model.desc: Resource location of the model used to render the item.
component:minecraft:jukebox_playable.des: Jukebox song played when the item is inserted.
component:minecraft:kinetic_weapon.desc: Speed-based damage behavior for weapons like the mace.
component:minecraft:lock.desc: Predicate that must be matched by a key to unlock.
component:minecraft:lodestone_tracker.de: Position tracked by a lodestone compass.
component:minecraft:lore.desc: Additional tooltip lines displayed under the name.
component:minecraft:map_color.desc: Tint color applied to the map item texture.
component:minecraft:map_decorations.desc: Icons drawn on the map by this item.
component:minecraft:map_id.desc: Saved map instance referenced by this item.
Pending post-processing (lock or scale) for the map.
component:minecraft:max_damage.desc: Total durability available before the item breaks.
component:minecraft:max_stack_size.desc: Maximum amount of items per stack (1 to 99).
component:minecraft:minimum_attack_charg: Minimum charge (0-1) required to perform a full attack.
component:minecraft:note_block_sound.des: Sound event played by a note block under this item.
component:minecraft:ominous_bottle_ampli: Bad Omen amplifier granted by the bottle (0-4).
component:minecraft:piercing_weapon.desc: Piercing hit behavior for ranged weapons.
component:minecraft:pot_decorations.desc: Decorative sherds on the four sides of the pot.
component:minecraft:potion_contents.desc: Base potion and custom effects for potion items.
component:minecraft:potion_duration_scal: Multiplier applied to every potion effect duration.
component:minecraft:profile.desc: Game profile (name, UUID, skin) for player heads.
component:minecraft:provides_banner_patt: Banner pattern tag unlocked by holding this item.
component:minecraft:provides_trim_materi: Armor trim material contributed by this ingredient.
component:minecraft:recipes.desc: Recipes unlocked by picking up this item (knowledge book).
component:minecraft:repairable.desc: Items accepted as repair material on an anvil.
component:minecraft:salmon/size.desc: Visual size variant of the salmon.
Enchantments carried by an enchanted book.
component:minecraft:suspicious_stew_effe: Mob effects applied by the suspicious stew.
component:minecraft:swing_animation.desc: Custom swing animation type and duration.
component:minecraft:tool.desc: Mining speed rules and durability loss per block.
component:minecraft:tooltip_display.desc: Which tooltip sections are hidden on this item.
component:minecraft:tooltip_style.desc: Resource location of the tooltip background style.
component:minecraft:trim.desc: Trim pattern and material applied to the armor piece.
component:minecraft:tropical_fish/base_c: Primary color of the tropical fish.
component:minecraft:tropical_fish/patter: Body pattern of the tropical fish.
Secondary color of the tropical fish pattern.
component:minecraft:use_cooldown.desc: Cooldown applied after the item is used.
component:minecraft:use_effects.desc: Sprint/vibration/speed tweaks while the item is in use.
component:minecraft:use_remainder.desc: Item left over after this item is consumed.
component:minecraft:villager/variant.des: Biome type of the villager (plains, desert, etc.).
component:minecraft:weapon.desc: Item damage per attack and blocking disable duration.
